topic: CP history for Democrats House control meta-question
summary: CP for underlying question has been oscillating between 8-9% since Oct 2025. Currently at exactly 9% as of Jan 3, 2026. Threshold is strict >9.00%. Only 22 forecasters. In Oct-Jan period, CP was above 9% only 26% of observations.
content: The underlying question (post 35760) asks if Democrats will control the House before Jan 3, 2027. CP has been declining from 25% in March 2025 to 8-9% range now. Most recent value is exactly 9% (Jan 3, 2026). The meta-question asks if CP will be STRICTLY above 9.00% on Jan 14, 2026. With 22 forecasters, the CP is volatile but has been mostly at or below 9% recently. The general trend is downward, and there's no obvious catalyst to push CP higher in the next 11 days.
